Lambda function for auto-deleting objects in

Properties.Description: Shared role for Chime Voice custom resources

Properties.AlarmDescription: Alarm when StartSession Lambda emits errors

Properties.Description: JSON map of clinicId to SIP Media Application ID
Properties.Name: /TodaysDentalInsightsChimeN1/SmaIdMap

Properties.Description: Trigger cleanup monitor to handle orphaned resources and stale agent presence
SQS Queue URL for compensating actions
Properties.Name: /TodaysDentalInsightsChimeN1/CompensatingActionsQueueUrl

Properties.Description: Kinesis stream ARN for AI transcript processing
Properties.Name: /TodaysDentalInsightsChimeN1/AiTranscriptStreamArn

Properties.Description: Role for Chime Media Insights Pipeline to access Kinesis and Transcribe
ARN of Media Insights Pipeline Configuration for AI transcription
Properties.Name: /TodaysDentalInsightsChimeN1/MediaInsightsPipelineConfigArn

ThinkingAudioUrl.Description: Public S3 URL for thinking audio (keyboard sounds) - use in ConnectLexAiStack

PublicAudioBucketName.Description: Public S3 bucket for Polly SSML audio files

ClinicsTableName.Description: Clinics table name for cross-stack references

ClinicsTableArn.Description: Clinics table ARN for cross-stack IAM policies

CallQueueTableName.Description: CallQueue table name - use this instead of deriving from stack name

AgentPerformanceTableNameExport.Description: AgentPerformance table name for cross-stack references

SmaIdMapParameterName.Description: SSM Parameter name containing SMA ID Map

HoldMusicBucketName.Description: S3 bucket for hold music and streaming TTS audio.

HoldMusicBucketArn.Description: S3 bucket ARN for hold music and streaming TTS audio.

VoiceConnectorId.Description: Voice Connector ID - use this to associate phone numbers

VoiceConnectorOutboundHostName.Description: Voice Connector Outbound Host - use this for SIP routing

CompensatingActionsQueueUrl.Description: SQS Queue URL for compensating actions

CompensatingActionsQueueArn.Description: SQS Queue ARN for compensating actions

RecordingsBucketName.Description: S3 bucket for call recordings (shared with AiAgentsStack)

RecordingsBucketArn.Description: S3 bucket ARN for cross-stack IAM permissions

CallQueueStreamProcessorArn.Description: Lambda processing CallQueue DynamoDB Stream events for analytics

AiTranscriptStreamArn.Description: Kinesis Data Stream for AI transcript processing

AiTranscriptBridgeFnArn.Description: Lambda that bridges transcripts to Voice AI handler

TranscribeAudioSegmentFnArn.Description: Lambda that transcribes AI voice call audio segments

MediaInsightsPipelineConfigArn.Description: ARN of Media Insights Pipeline Configuration for AI transcription

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
